findings.title: Unpinned Dependencies in package.json
findings.description: Dependencies in package.json use caret versions (e.g., ^18.3.1 for React, ^5.4.0 for Vite). This can result in non-deterministic builds across environments if lockfiles are inadvertently ignored, or cause unexpected breaks down the line.
findings.recommendation: Pin all critical dependencies to exact versions or enforce strict adherence to package-lock.json with 'npm ci' across all deployment and development environments.

findings.title: Missing Global window.onerror and unhandledrejection handlers
findings.description: While a React ErrorBoundary exists for the component tree, there is no global top-level handler for asynchronous operations or errors occurring outside the React lifecycle, resulting in unreported frontend crashes.
findings.recommendation: Add top-level event listeners for 'error' and 'unhandledrejection' to capture and report all unhandled UI crashes to the analytics service.

findings.title: Missing Startup Environment Variable Validation
findings.description: Required environment variables (e.g., Supabase URLs and Cloudinary credentials) are checked manually at runtime usage points rather than validated centrally at application startup. This can lead to silent execution failures.
findings.recommendation: Implement a centralized environment variable validation schema (e.g., Zod with env.mjs or t3-env) that throws an immediate error if the deployment lacks required variables.

findings.title: Missing Health Check API Endpoint
findings.description: The application lacks a dedicated `/api/health` Netlify function or endpoint. This prevents robust external uptime monitoring (e.g., from Pingdom or Datadog) beyond checking the static HTML.
findings.recommendation: Add a simple /api/health Netlify function returning { status: 'ok', timestamp: Date.now() }.

findings.title: Blanket catch Blocks Swallowing Errors
findings.description: Found numerous empty `catch` blocks or blocks that swallow the error entirely inside try-catch patterns across the codebase. This drastically reduces observability into transient pipeline failures.
findings.recommendation: Enforce a linting rule requiring all catch blocks to log the error at minimum, using analytics.track or console.error with surrounding context.

findings.title: Missing Deployment Environment Documentation
findings.description: No central README.md exists in the project root to document the full list of necessary environment variables or deployment steps required for a fresh install.
findings.recommendation: Create a unified README.md with comprehensive deployment instructions and required environment variables mapping.
